required_preferences.fact: Attends aquatic therapy sessions at the rehabilitation center as her primary form of exercise—never takes brisk outdoor walks until cleared by doctor

supersedes.fact: Takes daily brisk walks outdoors, rain or shine—never uses the treadmill indoors

required_preferences.fact: Now personally manages her mother's errands, transportation, and household tasks multiple times a week—rarely delegates or relies on remote coordination, prioritizing direct support due to her mother's new restrictions

supersedes.fact: Coordinates errands for her mother via phone/text and delegates some tasks to her son or friends when schedule conflicts arise due to weekend soccer travel—only visits in person when possible

required_preferences.fact: Declines late-night academic events or spontaneous evening outings to minimize migraine triggers identified in her headache log, prioritizing a strict evening wind-down routine
Plays board games with her son every Sunday afternoon—never allows digital devices during game time
Reads historical novels for leisure—never reads contemporary fiction
Attends local art exhibits monthly—never skips openings held at university museums

persona: A tenured history professor at a major university
